testcase.name: test_get_growth_partners_list
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_bug_fixes.py:129: in test_get_growth_partners_list assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 401: {"detail":"Invalid token"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
